title: Auto-filter unsupported cards in the RunPod GPU picker (CUDA-floor)
description: Promoted from MPI-64 Phase 3 Step 5.2 / OPEN-ITEMS F3 (user request 2026-06-12). The GPU picker must not offer cards the active image's CUDA floor can't run on the available hosts/DC. Cross-check the image CUDA floor (from POD_IMAGE/manifest) against RunPod's per-card/DC CUDA capability (RunPod's own console filters its dropdown by required CUDA, so the data exists in their GraphQL gpuTypes/availability) and gray-out or badge incompatible cards with a reason ('needs a newer-driver host / not available for this engine CUDA in {DC}'), instead of letting Connect fail at container init with the raw nvidia-container-cli error. Data axis = image CUDA floor vs host-driver-provided CUDA, per card/DC. Folds into the MPI-90 manifest-compat gate. App. See brief.md.
